mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_CODE as roleCode, ROLE_NM as roleNm, ROLE_PTTRN as rolePtn, ROLE_DC as roleDc, ROLE_TY as roleTyp, ROLE_SORT as roleSort, ROLE_CREAT_DE as roleCreatDe FROM LETTNROLEINFO WHERE ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode}

SELECT ROLE_CODE as roleCode, ROLE_NM as roleNm, ROLE_PTTRN as rolePtn, ROLE_DC as roleDc, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM029' AND CODE = ROLE_TY) AS roleTyp, ROLE_SORT as roleSort, ROLE_CREAT_DE as roleCreatDe FROM LETTNROLEINFO WHERE 1=1 AND ROLE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ROLE_CREAT_DE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNROLEINFO WHERE 1=1 AND ROLE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT ROLE_CODE as roleCode, ROLE_NM as roleNm, ROLE_PTTRN as rolePtn, ROLE_DC as roleDc, ROLE_TY as roleTyp, ROLE_SORT as roleSort, ROLE_CREAT_DE as roleCreatDe FROM LETTNROLEINFO
